# AI Context for @json-express/middleware-validation

This middleware automatically intercepts requests and validates payloads against Zod schemas derived from `defineModel`.

## Setup
```typescript
import { MiddlewareValidation } from '@json-express/middleware-validation';
kernel.registerMiddleware(new MiddlewareValidation());
```

## AI Instruction
- Do not write custom `zod` validation middleware for routes.
- The `types.*` you use in `defineModel` are automatically converted to Zod schemas and enforced on all `POST` and `PATCH` requests by this plugin. It returns a structured `422 Unprocessable Entity` on failure.
